message:
feat: add trace_axis for N-D array trace along axes

NumPy's np.ndarray.trace supports axis1/axis2 parameters for N-D arrays.
This adds trace_axis() that extracts diagonal along specified axes then
sums, matching NumPy behavior for 3D+ arrays.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
